title: Wholesome Moroccan Cannellini Beans Tagine
description: A grassy, pillowy Moroccan tagine featuring creamy cannellini beans, aromatic spices, and bright lemon, served in a clay tajine.

ingredients.name: fresh parsley, cilantro, and mint mix

instructions: Heat the olive oil in the tajine over medium heat until shimmering.
Add the diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Mix in the diced carrot and tomato paste, cooking for another 2 minutes.
Sprinkle the cumin, coriander, and smoked paprika, and stir for 1 minute to toast the spices.
Pour in the lemon juice and add the drained cannellini beans, stirring to coat the beans evenly.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the tajine, and simmer gently for 25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Just before serving, stir in the chopped herb mix for freshness.
Transfer the tagine to a serving dish and garnish with additional herbs if desired.
